subject: [SDNC] Make SDNC Service Mesh compatible
commit_message:
[SDNC] Make SDNC Service Mesh compatible

Normal behavior shouldn't change (https, use of AAF, same
configuration, ...).

Change configuration on SDNC in order to:
 * Prefer use of (non headless) services
 * Name the port with their protocol
   (required for kubernetes <1.18 with isito)
 * allow to disable https (and enable http)

Also slight changes in dgbuilder, music and network-name-gen.

Issue-ID: OOM-2258
Change-Id: I47131484e242b7a5efc5cf4cea05740eda1bdb0b
Signed-off-by: othman touijer <othman.touijer@soprasteria.com>
